datasets.name: 7b732535
queryLines:
-- ---------------------------------------------------------------------
-- 3) DASHBOARD QUERY (example): remove emoji logic; consume flag_emoji instead
-- ---------------------------------------------------------------------
WITH p AS (
  SELECT
    cp.coach_id,
    cp.coach_name,
    cp.nation_name_display,
    cp.flag_emoji,

    cp.games_played_all,
    cp.games_played_rated,
    cp.tournaments_played,
    cp.nations_played,

    cp.global_elo_current,
    cp.global_elo_peak_all,
    cp.global_elo_peak_post_threshold,
    cp.global_elo_peak_last_50,
    cp.global_elo_mean_all,
    cp.global_elo_median_all,

    cp.opponent_global_elo_mean_weighted,
    cp.opponents_count,

    cp.main_race_name,
    cp.main_race_games_played,
    cp.main_race_win_pct,

    cp.race_2_name,
    cp.race_2_games_played,

    cp.best_win_streak,
    cp.current_win_streak,
    cp.best_unbeaten_streak,
    cp.current_unbeaten_streak,

    cp.load_timestamp
  FROM naf_catalog.gold_presentation.coach_profile cp
  LEFT JOIN naf_catalog.gold_presentation.coach_identity_v ci
    ON cp.coach_id = ci.coach_id
),

race_stats AS (
  SELECT
    coach_id,
    COUNT(DISTINCT race_id) AS distinct_races_played,
    MAX(win_pct)            AS best_race_win_pct
  FROM naf_catalog.gold_presentation.coach_race_performance
  WHERE race_id <> 0
    AND games_played > 0
  GROUP BY coach_id
),

p2 AS (
  SELECT
    p.*,
    COALESCE(rs.distinct_races_played, 0) AS distinct_races_played,
    rs.best_race_win_pct
  FROM p
  LEFT JOIN race_stats rs
    ON p.coach_id = rs.coach_id
)

SELECT
  p2.coach_id,
  row.sort_order,
  row.label,
  row.profile,
  p2.load_timestamp
FROM p2
LATERAL VIEW explode(array(
  named_struct('sort_order',  1, 'label', '👤 NAF Name',   'profile', coalesce(p2.coach_name, 'Unknown coach')),
  named_struct('sort_order',  2, 'label', '🔢 NAF Number', 'profile', cast(p2.coach_id as string)),
  named_struct('sort_order',  3, 'label', '🌍 Nation',     'profile', concat(coalesce(p2.flag_emoji, '🌐'), ' ', coalesce(p2.nation_name_display, 'Unknown'))),

  named_struct('sort_order', 10, 'label', '📊 Overview', 'profile', ''),
  named_struct('sort_order', 11, 'label', ' • Total games (all)', 'profile', coalesce(cast(p2.games_played_all as string), '0')),
  named_struct('sort_order', 13, 'label', ' • Tournaments',       'profile', coalesce(cast(p2.tournaments_played as string), '0')),
  named_struct('sort_order', 14, 'label', ' • Nations played',    'profile', coalesce(cast(p2.nations_played as string), '0')),

  named_struct('sort_order', 20, 'label', '📈 Ratings', 'profile', ''),
  named_struct('sort_order', 21, 'label', ' • Current GLO',                'profile', coalesce(cast(round(p2.global_elo_current, 1) as string), 'N/A')),
  named_struct('sort_order', 22, 'label', ' • Peak GLO (all)',             'profile', coalesce(cast(round(p2.global_elo_peak_all, 1) as string), 'N/A')),
  named_struct('sort_order', 23, 'label', ' • Peak GLO (post-threshold)',  'profile', coalesce(cast(round(p2.global_elo_peak_post_threshold, 1) as string), 'N/A')),
  named_struct('sort_order', 24, 'label', ' • Peak GLO (last 50)',         'profile', coalesce(cast(round(p2.global_elo_peak_last_50, 1) as string), 'N/A')),
  named_struct('sort_order', 25, 'label', ' • Mean GLO (all)',             'profile', coalesce(cast(round(coalesce(p2.global_elo_mean_all, p2.global_elo_current), 1) as string), 'N/A')),
  named_struct('sort_order', 26, 'label', ' • Median GLO (all)',           'profile', coalesce(cast(round(coalesce(p2.global_elo_median_all, p2.global_elo_current), 1) as string), 'N/A')),
  named_struct('sort_order', 27, 'label', ' • Opponent mean GLO (weighted)','profile', coalesce(cast(round(p2.opponent_global_elo_mean_weighted, 1) as string), 'N/A')),
  named_struct('sort_order', 28, 'label', ' • Opponents faced (distinct)', 'profile', coalesce(cast(p2.opponents_count as string), '0')),

  named_struct('sort_order', 30, 'label', '🛡 Favourite race', 'profile', ''),
  named_struct('sort_order', 31, 'label', ' • Race',            'profile', coalesce(p2.main_race_name, 'N/A')),
  named_struct('sort_order', 32, 'label', ' • Games with race',  'profile', coalesce(cast(p2.main_race_games_played as string), '0')),
  named_struct('sort_order', 33, 'label', ' • Win % with race',  'profile', coalesce(cast(round(p2.main_race_win_pct, 1) as string), 'N/A')),
  named_struct('sort_order', 34, 'label', ' • Distinct races played', 'profile', coalesce(cast(p2.distinct_races_played as string), '0')),
  named_struct('sort_order', 35, 'label', ' • Best race win %',       'profile', coalesce(cast(round(p2.best_race_win_pct, 1) as string), 'N/A')),

  named_struct('sort_order', 40, 'label', '🔥 Streaks', 'profile', ''),
  named_struct('sort_order', 41, 'label', ' • Best win streak',      'profile', coalesce(cast(p2.best_win_streak as string), '0')),
  named_struct('sort_order', 42, 'label', ' • Current win streak',    'profile', coalesce(cast(p2.current_win_streak as string), '0')),
  named_struct('sort_order', 43, 'label', ' • Best unbeaten streak',  'profile', coalesce(cast(p2.best_unbeaten_streak as string), '0')),
  named_struct('sort_order', 44, 'label', ' • Current unbeaten streak','profile', coalesce(cast(p2.current_unbeaten_streak as string), '0'))
)) e AS row
ORDER BY
  p2.coach_id,
  row.sort_order;

datasets.name: 7e6b0b4b
queryLines:
-- DASHBOARD DATASET: coach_cumulative_results_daily_series (contract-aligned)
-- Source contract: naf_catalog.gold_presentation.coach_cumulative_results_daily_series
SELECT
  coach_id,
  coach_name,
  event_day,
  result,
  value
FROM naf_catalog.gold_presentation.coach_cumulative_results_daily_series
WHERE scope = 'GLOBAL'
  AND race_id = 0
ORDER BY
  coach_id,
  event_day,
  result_order;

datasets.name: a59b382e
queryLines:
-- QUERY: coach_race_performance (dashboard dataset)
-- =================================================
-- PURPOSE
--   Full per-coach, per-race metrics from the presentation contract,
--   with a parameter-controlled minimum games threshold.
--
-- PARAMS
--   :min_games  INT   -- minimum games_played required per (coach_id, race_id)
--
-- OUTPUT GRAIN
--   One row per (coach_id, race_id) (filtered by min_games)
--
-- SOURCE CONTRACT
--   naf_catalog.gold_presentation.coach_race_performance

WITH params AS (
  SELECT CAST(COALESCE(:min_games, 0) AS INT) AS min_games
)

SELECT
  crp.*
FROM naf_catalog.gold_presentation.coach_race_performance AS crp
CROSS JOIN params AS p
WHERE COALESCE(crp.games_played, 0) >= p.min_games
ORDER BY
  crp.coach_id,
  crp.games_played DESC,
  crp.race_id;

datasets.name: 7287b5e0
queryLines:
-- QUERY: coach_race_rating_timeseries (dashboard dataset)  [RACE SCOPE]
-- ===================================================================
-- PURPOSE
--   One row per coach game per race (RACE scope) showing Elo rating change + display fields,
--   sourced from the GOLD_PRESENTATION canonical contract.
--
-- LAYER
--   gold_presentation (thin passthrough; include all new metrics automatically)
--
-- OUTPUT GRAIN
--   One row per (rating_system, coach_id, race_id, game_id)
--
-- SOURCE (presentation contract)
--   naf_catalog.gold_presentation.coach_race_elo_rating_history

SELECT
  *
FROM naf_catalog.gold_presentation.coach_race_elo_rating_history
WHERE rating_system = 'NAF_ELO'
ORDER BY
  coach_id,
  race_id,
  COALESCE(event_timestamp, CAST(game_date AS TIMESTAMP)),
  game_index,
  game_id;

datasets.name: 52345e69
queryLines:
SELECT
  *
FROM naf_catalog.gold_presentation.coach_global_elo_rating_history
WHERE rating_system = 'NAF_ELO'
ORDER BY
  coach_id,
  COALESCE(event_timestamp, CAST(game_date AS TIMESTAMP)),
  game_index,
  game_id;

datasets.name: 92b53229
queryLines:
-- QUERY: Overall results (dashboard dataset)
SELECT
  coach_id,
  level,
  result,
  value
FROM naf_catalog.gold_presentation.coach_results_all_long
ORDER BY coach_id, level, result;

datasets.name: 3660cd57
queryLines:
-- QUERY: coach_opponent_insights (dashboard dataset)
-- =================================================
-- PURPOSE
--   Per-coach opponent “insights” table for dashboards (strength + outcomes vs opponents),
--   including all metrics exposed by the presentation contract.
--
-- LAYER
--   gold_presentation (thin passthrough: do not rename/recompute fields here)
--
-- OUTPUT GRAIN
--   One row per (coach_id, category, opponent_coach_id) as defined by the presentation contract
--
-- SOURCE CONTRACT
--   naf_catalog.gold_presentation.coach_opponent_insights

SELECT
  *
FROM naf_catalog.gold_presentation.coach_opponent_insights

datasets.name: 15dbc912
queryLines:
SELECT
  coach_id,
  bin_scheme_id,
  bin_scheme_name_display,
  bin_label,
  opponents_count,
  games_played,
  wins,
  draws,
  losses,
  win_pct,
  win_points,
  win_points_per_game
FROM naf_catalog.gold_presentation.coach_opponent_global_elo_bin_insights
WHERE bin_scheme_id = COALESCE(NULLIF(:bin_scheme_id, ''), 'dynamic_5')
ORDER BY
  bin_index;

datasets.name: f732672a
queryLines:
-- DASHBOARD DATASET: coach_opponent_global_elo_bin_results_long (single-contract read)  [ALIGNED]
-- Notes:
--   - Reads ONLY from canonical presentation contract.
--   - Keeps legacy output names (category/value/value_pct/result_sort_order) via aliases.
--   - value is derived from result_frac * games_played (the contract stores rates + games_played).

SELECT
  coach_id,
  bin_scheme_id,
  bin_scheme_name_display,

  bin_label AS category,
  bin_index,

  result,

  CAST(ROUND(result_frac * games_played, 0) AS BIGINT) AS value,
  result_pct AS value_pct,

  result_order AS result_sort_order
FROM naf_catalog.gold_presentation.coach_opponent_global_elo_bin_results_long
WHERE bin_scheme_id = COALESCE(NULLIF(:bin_scheme_id, ''), 'dynamic_5')
ORDER BY
  bin_index;

datasets.name: 12e14a43
datasets.displayName: Coach Win Streaks and Profile Snapshot
queryLines:
SELECT
  coach_id,
  best_win_streak,
  current_win_streak,
  load_timestamp
FROM naf_catalog.gold_presentation.coach_profile
WHERE coach_id = :coach_id;
